tog.tagline: An imprisoned assassin is offered a path to freedom through a deadly competition at the royal court.
tog.summary: Celaena Sardothien has survived a year in the Endovier salt mines when Crown Prince Dorian offers her an unexpected bargain: compete against other criminals and warriors for the title of the King of Adarlan’s Champion. If she wins and serves the king for four years, she will earn her freedom. Brought to the glass castle in Rifthold, Celaena must recover her strength, conceal her true identity, and navigate a court filled with ambition, suspicion, and dangerous secrets. As the competition advances, a series of disturbing events suggests that something far older and more threatening is moving beneath the surface.
tog.contentStatus: All 55 chapter recaps and the complete book recap are available.

com.tagline: The King’s Champion begins carrying out missions while questioning who she can trust.
com.summary: Now serving as the king’s personal Champion, Celaena is sent to eliminate people the crown considers enemies. Her position gives her greater access to the court but also traps her inside a system she despises. As she investigates her targets, she becomes increasingly aware that political rebellion, forbidden magic, and secrets within the castle are connected. Her relationships with Dorian, Chaol, and Nehemia are tested as she struggles to decide when survival becomes complicity.
com.contentStatus: All 56 chapter recaps and the complete book recap are available.

tab.tagline: Five linked novellas reveal the missions and relationships that shaped Celaena before Endovier.
tab.summary: This prequel collection follows Celaena during her years in the Assassin’s Guild under Arobynn Hamel. Across several dangerous assignments, she encounters smugglers, pirates, healers, rival assassins, and people whose choices challenge the life she has been trained to accept. The stories reveal the friendships, loyalties, betrayals, and losses that shaped her before the opening of Throne of Glass.
tab.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

hof.tagline: Far from Adarlan, Celaena is forced to confront her power, grief, and identity.
hof.summary: Sent across the sea to Wendlyn, Celaena reaches a point where she can no longer avoid the pain and history she has buried. Her training with Rowan Whitethorn forces her to understand her magic and decide whether she is willing to fight for more than her own freedom. Elsewhere, Dorian, Chaol, Aedion, and the Ironteeth witches are pulled into separate conflicts that begin reshaping the wider war.
hof.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

qos.tagline: Old debts come due as Celaena returns to Rifthold with a plan.
qos.summary: Celaena returns to the capital determined to rescue those still trapped by the king’s power and settle unfinished business with people from her past. Rifthold has become more dangerous, and several characters who once stood apart are drawn into the same struggle. Alliances shift, identities are reclaimed, and the conflict inside the city reaches a decisive turning point.
qos.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

eos.tagline: War spreads across kingdoms as armies, rulers, and ancient powers move into position.
eos.summary: The fight for Erilea expands across seas and kingdoms as Aelin seeks allies, military strength, and answers about the forces gathering against her. Political bargains, old promises, and dangerous magic shape every decision. Events occur alongside Tower of Dawn and move the series toward its final war.
eos.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

tod.tagline: A mission to the Southern Continent becomes a journey of healing, diplomacy, and discovery.
tod.summary: Chaol and Nesryn travel to Antica seeking medical help and the support of the powerful khaganate. Their mission introduces a new court, new political tensions, and information that changes the characters’ understanding of the larger enemy. The story occurs alongside Empire of Storms.
tod.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

koa.tagline: The final war asks every character what they are willing to sacrifice.
koa.summary: Armies, rulers, witches, warriors, and long-separated allies converge as the struggle for Erilea reaches its conclusion. The characters must endure the consequences of earlier bargains while defending their homes and deciding what kind of future they are fighting to create.
koa.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

acotar1.tagline: A human huntress is drawn into a dangerous faerie realm after killing a wolf.
acotar1.summary: Feyre Archeron hunts to keep her impoverished family alive in the mortal lands. After killing a wolf that was more than it appeared, she is taken across the wall into Prythian by Tamlin, a powerful faerie lord. As Feyre learns more about the Spring Court and the curse affecting its people, her fear and resentment begin to change—but a growing threat places both the faerie and mortal worlds in danger.
acotar1.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

acomaf.tagline: After surviving Under the Mountain, Feyre must decide what recovery and freedom mean.
acomaf.summary: Feyre returns from the events of the first book carrying new power and deep trauma. Her life in the Spring Court no longer feels as simple as she expected, and an existing bargain draws her into the Night Court. New friendships, hidden cities, and a looming war force her to reconsider what she wants and who she has become.
acomaf.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

acowar.tagline: Prythian’s courts prepare for war while alliances are tested.
acowar.summary: With conflict approaching, Feyre and her allies must gather information, persuade rival courts to cooperate, and prepare both faerie and mortal lands for invasion. Political mistrust and personal history complicate every alliance as the war for Prythian reaches its decisive stage.
acowar.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

acofas.tagline: A quieter bridge story follows the characters as they rebuild and prepare for what comes next.
acofas.summary: Set after the war, this novella focuses on recovery, relationships, and the practical work of rebuilding. As the Winter Solstice approaches, the characters try to create moments of peace while carrying wounds and unresolved tensions that will shape the next chapter of the series.
acofas.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

acosf.tagline: Nesta’s struggle with trauma, power, and belonging takes center stage.
acosf.summary: Nesta Archeron is isolated by anger, grief, and experiences she cannot easily name. Forced into a new routine of training and work, she gradually forms unexpected friendships and begins confronting both her own power and the forces threatening Prythian. The story centers healing, self-determination, and the creation of a chosen family.
acosf.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

hoeab.tagline: A murder investigation pulls Bryce Quinlan into the secrets beneath Crescent City.
hoeab.summary: Bryce Quinlan’s life in Lunathion is shattered by a brutal crime. Years later, when similar murders begin again, she is ordered to investigate alongside Hunt Athalar, an enslaved angel working for the city’s authorities. Their search moves through Crescent City’s houses, political factions, nightlife, and ancient history while forcing Bryce to confront the grief she has tried to bury.
hoeab.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

hosab.tagline: Bryce and her allies are drawn deeper into Midgard’s conflicts and hidden history.
hosab.summary: Bryce and Hunt hope for a quieter life after the events of the first book, but a new mystery connects them to rebels, missing people, and secrets protected by Midgard’s rulers. Their circle expands as the investigation raises questions about loyalty, freedom, and the true history of their world.
hosab.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.

hofas.tagline: Separate worlds and long-hidden truths collide as the fight for Midgard escalates.
hofas.summary: Bryce is separated from many of her allies while the struggle against the Asteri reaches a critical point. The characters search for a way back to one another, uncover evidence about Midgard’s past, and prepare for a confrontation that affects more than one world.
hofas.contentStatus: Book and chapter content is being prepared.
